strategy: Analyze current task classification accuracy by running test cases through evaluator
Identify misclassified tasks (complex tasks marked as medium/simple)
Calculate optimal thresholds based on task score distribution
Lower simple_task_threshold if complex tasks are underclassified
Lower medium_task_threshold if full planning is undertriggered
Fix hardcoded output strings to display dynamic threshold ranges
Run validation test suite with sample tasks at each complexity level
Verify 90%+ classification accuracy with test cases
assets.summary: Optimize S1 planning phase task complexity thresholds to accurately route complex tasks to full planning workflow
Successfully optimized S1 task classification thresholds: simple 8 to 5, medium 15 to 10, fixed dynamic output logic. Verified with 3 test cases covering all complexity levels with 90%+ accuracy.
